THEUNDERSTUDY-BRIO.description: Whenever a debuff is applied to you during your turn, gain {IfUpgraded:show:5|3} [gold]Vigor[/gold].

THEUNDERSTUDY-PERFORMANCE.title: Performance
THEUNDERSTUDY-PERFORMANCE.description:
Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to up to {Select:diff()} attacks and skills.
THEUNDERSTUDY-INTENTION.title: Intention
THEUNDERSTUDY-INTENTION.description: Apply [gold]Intense[/gold] to up to {Select:diff()} attacks and skills.
THEUNDERSTUDY-RISTRETTO.title: Ristretto
THEUNDERSTUDY-RISTRETTO.description:
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from up to {Cards:diff()} cards in your hand.
Gain 1 [gold]Limited[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-APERTO.title: Aperto
THEUNDERSTUDY-APERTO.description:
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from up to {Cards:diff()} cards in your hand.
Convert 1 [gold]Limited[/gold] to [gold]Unlimited[/gold].
